data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system automatically cancels or releases seats for unpaid bookings, as required. The linked use case describes the expected behavior but does not provide concrete evidence of this functionality being executed, indicating a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of auto-cancel/release rules being implemented for unpaid seats.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
